heading: Definition of State
label: 719b–1 Definition of State
text: For the purposes of this subchapter, the term “State” includes the District of Columbia, the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico, the Commonwealth of the Northern Mariana Islands, American Samoa, Guam, the Virgin Islands, and any other territory or possession of the United States.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior was renumbered section 6 and is classified to .section 5 of Pub. L. 103–340section 719c of this title
